name: createDashboard
description: Create a new dashboard from a JSON document. The dashboard JSON must include required fields: name, owner, charts, layout, refreshTime, schemaVersion (2), timeWindowStart, timeWindowEnd. Set owner to X-AXIOM-EVERYONE to make it visible to all org members.

dashboardJson.description: The full dashboard document as a JSON string. Must include required fields: name, owner, charts (array), layout (array), refreshTime (15, 60, or 300), schemaVersion (2), timeWindowStart, timeWindowEnd.

uid.description: Optional custom UID for the dashboard. If omitted, the server generates one.

message.description: Optional audit/change note for this operation.
